channel.title: Weekend on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Weekend on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Day 28 — The Weekend Recycle. v3's First Trick Was a Bug.
item.description:
Mon Jun 8 2026 · v3 Live Day +36h · Pre-Market

The Number

No trades. No fills. 0 errors for 36 straight hours since Sat 13:09 UTC when v3 hit the wire. Working-MTM equity $98,239. v3 starting bank +$2,089 working-MTM (cash +$842 / NVDA orphan MTM +$200). Sat 13:00 UTC re-opt anchor consumed. Mon 13:30 UTC = v3’s first FULL session AND the NVDA MOO fill, simultaneously. One day, two opening bells.
